name: IncorrectContract
description: Customer has received their Virgin Media contract and believes it contains errors or doesn't match what was agreed — such as wrong pricing, incorrect package details, missing products, or wrong personal details on the contract document. This is not about requesting a contract copy, checking contract dates, or making a general complaint about service.

sampleUtterances.utterance: My new contract doesn't match what I agreed to
